final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing cover image for a 小红书 (Xiaohongshu) creator-style post featuring the DJI Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人" (authentic creator / non-professional) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid layout for 小红书 cover
Subject: must include the DJI Pocket 4 as the featured product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a casual, approachable atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (central title, cute and differentiated typography)
Constraints: must be vertical 小红书 cover format, 9-grid layout preserved
Avoid: must avoid overly polished/professional influencer aesthetic
